# Inboundr

Inboundr is AI-native sales infrastructure for turning inbound inquiries into revenue. It replies to leads, generates quotes, follows up, initiates calls, and helps close deals automatically.

## Core Pages

- /
  Overview of Inboundr, including the core value proposition: AI that replies, quotes, follows up, and closes automatically.
- /features
  Product updates and new features shipping to Inboundr.
- /features/forms
  Form Studio, a form builder for creating branded forms, collecting submissions, tracking responses, and feeding leads into Inboundr's AI workflow.

## Product

- /product/ai-crm
  AI-powered CRM that captures inbound leads from email, WhatsApp, website chat, and phone inquiries in one timeline.
- /product/auto-reply
  AI auto-reply that reads inbound messages, detects intent, drafts personalized responses, and sends or queues replies for review.
- /product/quotes
  AI quote generation that matches product requests to catalogs, applies pricing rules, and produces quote-ready drafts.
- /product/follow-ups
  AI follow-up sequences across email, WhatsApp, and SMS that adapt to deal stage, lead temperature, and engagement.
- /product/calls
  AI calls that qualify warm leads, handle key questions, hand off to reps, and log structured call summaries.

## Company

- /about
  Company overview, manifesto, values, and story behind Inboundr.
- /blog
  Articles on AI sales, inbound automation, response time, quote generation, and customer engagement.
- /careers
  Careers and hiring information for Inboundr.
- /contact
  Contact page for reaching the Inboundr team.

## Trust and Legal

- /security
  Security practices, trust and compliance information, encryption, access controls, AI model privacy, data retention, and vulnerability reporting.
- /privacy
  Privacy policy for Inboundr.
- /terms
  Terms of service for Inboundr.

## Contact

- hello@inboundr.ai
  General inquiries, demos, and sales conversations.
- security@inboundr.ai
  Responsible disclosure and vulnerability reports.
